◎简　　介  

　　The Life & Times of Tim is an animated comedy that tells the story of Tim Dildarian, an average cubicle monkey in his mid 20s that works for the generic company "Omnicorp" in New York.Throughout the series, Tim constantly finds himself in increasingly awkward situations in both his work and personal lifehttp://www.hbo.com/the-life-and-times-of-tim/index.html
